titleStmt.title: SII 42.38: original edition by C Somasundara Rao
No. 38. (A.R. No. B. 47 of 1953-54.) Narnūru, Kurnool Taluk, Kurnool District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab in front of the Vīrabhadrasvāmin temple.
The record is dated Śaka 1467, Viśvāvasu, Āśvija, ba. 3, corresponding to 1545 A.D., September 23.

Records the settlement of a dispute among the priests of the Śaiva temples at Nariyanūru and registers a grant to them by Narasiṅgayyadēva-mahārāja of Vōruvikaṁṭi, excempting them from certain taxes to enable them to cultivate their lands. It refers to the desertion of the village by some of the priests owing to some disputes; their grievance was set right by the intervention of the Chief.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu
namastuṁgga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracā
mara cāravē . (trai)lōkya nagarāraṁbha
mūlastaṁbhāya va(śaṁ)bhavē
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śā
livāhana śakavaruṣaṁbulu
1467 Agunēṭi viśvāvasu saṁ
vvatsara Āśvija ba 3 lu śrīmanmahā
maṁḍalēśvara vōruvikaṁṭi na
rasiṁgayyadēva mahārājuṁgā
ru nariyanūri si(śi)vastā(sthā)nāla pūjacēsē
taṁmarasavaja(ji)yya liṁgana mudajiyya
tiṁmana vā palli virā nā ma nāśiru
modalayina nālugu pāḷla vāriki Iccina
dharma sā(śā)sanaṁ . mīru grāmaṁ dēvastā(sthā)nā
laku pūja naivēdyaṁ dīpārādhana Idēna
variṁnnu kaḍanu nākuṁḍānu cēsitimi .
kuniḷavaḍi tṛṁ mīlō pāḷa vā
ru koṁdaru pōyivuṁḍaṁgā
nu vārini rappiṁci vūranu vuṁḍaka [Ūṇa]
sēsi niḷaveṭṭi maṁnistimiṁgāna mīru yē
mī lō vicāriraṁ ceṁdaka maṁmmu saṁgamadē
vastānaṁku che(ce)llē kṣētrālu vyavasāyā
lu sēsuka sukhāna bradi(ti)kēdi .
Digital edition of SII 42.38 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
